race.comment: Good little race. DUCHESS ZOU (15) was plain disappointing in the same race as a $2.70 chance with the track firmness offered as an excuse. She's been costly this time in but could bounce back. TEST OF LOVE (7) comes into this tougher assignment as a last start winner over 1400m at Warrnambool. Has claims off that. ROADCONE (5) resumed over 1400m at Flemington last start and finished 3.5 lengths away in seventh. Fitter and worth including. RAIKOKE (8) was in the money two starts back at Terang but couldn't back that up when unplaced over 1400m at Warrnambool last time. Can improve here as can LAA DE SHA (4).
